name: Vietnam Luxury Wellness Retreat Escape 8 days
duration: Places:Hanoi - Mai Chau - Da Nang - Hoi An
highlights: Take part in total retreat activities such as yoga class and biking trip
Savor all of the wellness offerings of the fancy resort, including yoga sessions, saunas, and body massages
Unwind physically and spiritually in tranquility of Mai Chau and Hoi An
Enjoy all of the luxury resort's wellness activities, such as body massage, sauna, and yoga classes

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival
itinerary.description:
When you arrive at Noi Bai International Airport, our driver and guide will meet you there and take you to your luxury hotel in Hanoi. Rest and check in after a lengthy flight

Free time to spend the remainder of the day exploring Hanoi

NOTE: Please get in touch with us if you would want an early check-in at an extra cost; check-in time is after 14:00.

itinerary.title: Discover the Natural Beauty and Culture of Mai Chau Valley
itinerary.description:
Morning

07:00 - 07:30 Guests will be picked up from their hotel in Hanoi’s Old Quarter. The journey to Mai Chau takes travelers through winding mountain roads, offering stunning views of lush valleys and traditional stilt houses. Along the way, visitors can observe the daily life of the Muong and Thai ethnic communities, whose villages are nestled harmoniously between the mountains and rice fields. A stop at Thung Khe Pass allows guests to admire the panoramic beauty of Mai Chau Valley. This location is also home to a small roadside market where Muong ethnic people sell fresh produce, local d...

itinerary.title: Mai Chau - Visit Remote Na Meo Village - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Distance & Est. time: Cycling 2 km

Morning

A traditional breakfast will be served at the homestay, allowing guests to start the day with a taste of local flavors. Accompanied by a local Thai guide, guests will embark on a 2 km cycling journey before starting a guided trek to the remote villages of Na Meo, Na Mo, and Xam Pa. This trek offers an immersive experience of the daily life of the Thai ethnic people, providing opportunities to admire vast rice terraces and gain deeper insights into their cultural heritage. Upon returning to the homestay, guests will check out and enjoy a farewell lun...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Flight to Da Nang - Hoi An
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast, proceed to the checkout. Our driver will come for you so you may go to the Hanoi airport and take a flight to Da Nang. When you get there, head to your luxury hotel in Hoi An to check in. You are free to spend the remainder of the day exploring this quaint old town. You can enjoy local food, take a boat trip of the serene Hoai River, take a leisurely stroll through the lovely town at night, and more

itinerary.title: Departure from Da Nang - End of a Luxury Journey
itinerary.description: BestPrice Travel guide will be ready to pick you up in the morning. Make sure you enjoy your last breakfast and pack your luggage for your flight. The moment you reach the Da Nang International Airport will mark an end to your 8-day holiday trip. We hope that Vietnam gave you many memorable moments and will wait for your next trip with us!

included: All transport within Vietnam (including airport pick up & see off), as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide
Spa/Massage package in Almanity Hoi An Resort & Spa
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
